headline: If You’d Invested $10,000 In Lockheed Martin When The Iran Conflict Started, Here’s How Much You’d Have Now
summary: Defense stocks are supposed to surge when conflict breaks out, yet Lockheed Martin investors who bought in on the first day of the Iran war got a painful education in why geopolitics rarely works as a stock thesis.

raw.headline: If You’d Invested $10,000 In Lockheed Martin When The Iran Conflict Started, Here’s How Much You’d Have Now
raw.summary: Defense stocks are supposed to surge when conflict breaks out, yet Lockheed Martin investors who bought in on the first day of the Iran war got a painful education in why geopolitics rarely works as a stock thesis.

headline: Boeing Stock And The Number Behind The Worry
summary: The company's most important production line appears stable, but the real test for investors is still to come, and it hinges on one critical figure.

raw.headline: Boeing Stock And The Number Behind The Worry

headline: $50 Billion Is About to Flood Into Defense Stocks: Here’s Who Cashes In
summary: NATO allies just converted a years-old spending pledge into a wave of purchase orders, and one defense analyst has a specific test for separating the stocks that will actually see the cash from those chasing headlines.

raw.headline: $50 Billion Is About to Flood Into Defense Stocks: Here’s Who Cashes In
